== Notes for [[Item:Q105108|Q105108]] ==

=== GEDCOM Note ===
ihr richtiger Taufname

=== GEDCOM Note ===
28 June 2014 by FamilySearch

=== GEDCOM Note ===
in der Schweiz früher so üblich

=== GEDCOM Note ===
=== X ck birth date ===
X ck birth date

=== GEDCOM Note ===
===

NOT-A-MATCH: This individual is not th ===

NOT-A-MATCH: This individual is not the same as Margaret // 1557-1611, PAF ID

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000002578070242

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
